name: The Mr. Turkey 300-calorie Sandwich
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the meat slices and cheese between bread slices.
2. Add lettuce, tomatoes, and alfalfa sprouts on top of the sandwich.
3. Slice the sandwich in half if desired.
NOTE: The calorie count is based on the full sandwich; it does not include calories from lettuce, tomatoes, and alfalfa sprouts, which are minimal. This recipe contains nearly half the calories of a sandwich made with regular lunchmeat, cheese, and bread.
